dis: River discharge evaluated at the pour point (m³/s) derived from the HydroATLAS v1.0 discharge climatology; see HydroATLAS Technical Documentation Table 4.
run: Runoff depth (mm/yr) computed from WaterGAP 2.2 climatology for HydroATLAS v1.0 (Table 4).
inu: Floodplain inundation fraction (%) combining bankfull channel and seasonal flood extent following HydroATLAS v1.0 Table 5 (Lehner et al., 2019).
ria: Riverine inundated area (ha) from GIEMS-D25 aggregated per reporting unit as described in HydroATLAS v1.0 Table 5.
riv: Total mapped river channel length (km) from HydroRIVERS polylines within the reporting unit (HydroATLAS v1.0 Table 4).
lka: Share of the reporting unit covered by lakes and reservoirs (%) from GLWD classes 1–11 (HydroATLAS v1.0 Table 5).
lkv: Combined natural lake and reservoir volume (10^6 m³) sourced from HydroLAKES/GRanD per HydroATLAS v1.0 Table 5.
rev: Managed reservoir storage volume (10^6 m³) derived from GRanD v1.3, summarized as in HydroATLAS v1.0 Table 5.
dor: Degree of regulation (%) = upstream reservoir storage / mean annual discharge (Lehner et al., 2014); HydroATLAS v1.0 Table 5.
gwt: Depth to groundwater table (cm) from Fan et al. 2013 global product, averaged within each reporting unit (HydroATLAS v1.0 Table 6).
ele: Mean surface elevation (m) based on GMTED2010 at 7.5 arc-second resolution (HydroATLAS v1.0 Table 3).
slp: Mean surface slope (degrees) calculated from GMTED2010 DEM derivatives (HydroATLAS v1.0 Table 3).
sgr: Average stream gradient (m/km) computed along HydroRIVERS centerlines (HydroATLAS v1.0 Table 4).
clz: Köppen-Geiger climate zone identifier from GEnS (HydroATLAS v1.0 Table 2).
cls: Climate strata ID from the Global Environmental Stratification (HydroATLAS v1.0 Table 2).
snw: Fraction of time with snow cover (%) from MODIS MOD10A1 climatology aggregated as in HydroATLAS v1.0 Table 2.
glc: GLC2000 land-cover class fractions (%) describing the reporting unit (HydroATLAS v1.0 Table 6).
pnv: Potential natural vegetation class fractions from EarthStat (HydroATLAS v1.0 Table 6).
wet: Wetland class fractions (%) based on GLWD classes (HydroATLAS v1.0 Table 6).
soc: Soil organic carbon stock (t/ha) from ISRIC SoilGrids aggregated by HydroATLAS (Table 6).
cly: Topsoil clay fraction (%) from SoilGrids (HydroATLAS v1.0 Table 6).
slt: Topsoil silt fraction (%) from SoilGrids (HydroATLAS v1.0 Table 6).
snd: Topsoil sand fraction (%) from SoilGrids (HydroATLAS v1.0 Table 6).
swc: Volumetric soil-water content (%) from GLDAS/Noah climatology (HydroATLAS v1.0 Table 6).
pop: Total population (persons) from LandScan 2010 aggregated within each reporting unit (HydroATLAS v1.0 Table 7).
ppd: Population density (persons/km²) from LandScan 2010 (HydroATLAS v1.0 Table 7).
urb: Urban land fraction (%) from GlobCover 2009 resampled for HydroATLAS v1.0 Table 7.
nli: Nighttime lights index from VIIRS/DMSP stable lights (HydroATLAS v1.0 Table 7).
rdd: Road density (km per 100 km²) from gROADS v1 aggregated by HydroATLAS v1.0 Table 7.
hft: Human Footprint Index (dimensionless, 1993 or 2009) from Venter et al. 2016 (HydroATLAS v1.0 Table 7).
gdp: Gross domestic product per capita (constant 2011 PPP USD) from World Bank/SEDAC grids aggregated as in HydroATLAS v1.0 Table 7.
hdi: UNDP Human Development Index (2013) averaged over each reporting unit (HydroATLAS v1.0 Table 7).
